name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Execution Contract
purpose: Define the future real publish execution pipeline while keeping actual publish forbidden in the current MVP.
future_phases: re-run readiness analyzer or compare checksum
stage runtime files in temporary staging directory
write runtime files atomically where possible
run migrations only in explicit future publish mode
forbidden_current_operations: copy candidate or dry-run artifacts into runtime paths
agent_notes: AI Builder Agent may summarize this future execution plan.
AI Builder Agent must not execute publish, acquire publish locks, write runtime files, run migrations, or execute rollback.
Approved candidate preflight is an input to future publish, not publish itself.
